metadata: {"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "unitless", "desc": "regularized objective that minimizes total fuel mass subject to other necessary additions", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "Fuel burned from taxi out of the gate through the regular missions to taxi into the gate.This does not include fuel burned in reserve phases. This works for energy-state EOM. Not used in 2DOF EOM", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "Difference between the usable fuel capacity on the aircraft and the total fuel (including reserve) required for the mission. Must be >= 0 to ensure that the aircraft has enough fuel to complete the mission", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "Fuel burned from taxi-out through all regular phases of the mission (e.g. takeoff, climb, cruse, descent, landing).This does not include fuel burned in reserve phases or taxi-in.The only time taxi-in would be included in this is if the userspecifies a taxi phase as part of the regular mission phases.", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "the total fuel reserves which is the sum of: Mission.RESERVE_FUEL, Mission.RESERVE_FUEL_ADDITIONAL, Mission.RESERVE_FUEL_MARGIN", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "fuel burned during reserve phases, this does not include fuel burned in regular phases", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "residual to make sure aircraft mass closes on actual gross takeoff mass, value should be zero at convergence (within acceptable tolerance)", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

_children.metadata: {"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": "AERIN.FCLDES"}, "units": "unitless", "desc": "Fixed design lift coefficient. If input, overrides design lift coefficient computed by EDET.", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

metadata: {"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "unitless", "desc": "ratio of lift to drag at takeoff", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

_children.metadata: {"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "unitless", "desc": "fuselage diameter to wing span ratio", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}
{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "unitless", "desc": "fuselage length to diameter ratio", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": ["EDETIN.XD"]}, "units": "ft", "desc": "A coarse average diameter calculated using the mean of max width and depth.", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "ft", "desc": "Reynolds characteristic length for nacelle for each engine model", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": true}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "ft", "desc": "Reynolds characteristic length for the horizontal tail", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}
{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "unitless", "desc": "horizontal tail fineness ratio", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "ft", "desc": "Reynolds characteristic length for the vertical tail", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}
{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "unitless", "desc": "vertical tail fineness ratio", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

metadata: {"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "ft**2", "desc": "total aircraft wetted area", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}
{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "ft**2", "desc": "canard wetted area", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "unitless", "desc": "wing fineness ratio", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": "INGASP.CW(5)", "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "Avionics group mass. Includes equipment and installation mass.", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "total mass of the non-flight crew and their baggage", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}
{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "mass of canards", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}
{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "total mass of as-flown cargo", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

_children.metadata: {"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "mass of passenger baggage", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "TBD: total mass of all passengers without their baggage", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": "INGASP.WPL", "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "mass of passenger payload, including passengers, passenger baggage", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

metadata: {"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "total mass of payload, including passengers, passenger baggage, and cargo", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}
{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "mass of cargo containers", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}
{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "mass of the electrical system", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

_children.metadata: {"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "additional engine mass not counted by existing categories (such as engine control and starter mass in FLOPS). In GASP, this is engine installation mass.", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": true}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "Scaled mass of a single engine. Engine mass includes installation mass, accessory gear boxes & drive, exhaust system, engine cooling, water injection, engien controls starting system, propeller/fan installation, lubricating system, and the drive system. Drive system mass contains gearboxes including lubrication and rotor brakes, transmission drive, rotor shaft, and gas drive. Fuel system is bookept as a separate line item in the propulsion group. For nonconventional engines, such as all-electric, engine mass should also contain masses appropriate for per-engine mass bookeeping (such as motor mass).", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": true}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": "INGASP.WEP", "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "total mass of all engines on aircraft", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

metadata: {"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "engine oil mass", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}
{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "mass of vertical fins", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "total mass of the flight crew and their baggage", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "Fuel system mass. Includes tanks (both protected and unprotected), plumbing, and similar masses.", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "Fuselage group mass. Contains basic structure and secondary structures such as enclosures, flooring, doors, ramps, panels, etc.", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}
{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "mass of horizontal tail", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}
{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "mass of hydraulic system", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}
{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "instrument group mass", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}
{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "mass of main landing gear (WMG in GASP)", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}
{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "mass of nose landing gear", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}
{"historical_name": {"GASP": "INGASP.WLG", "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "total mass of landing gear", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": "INGASP.WFC", "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "Flight controls group mass. Contains cockpit controls, automatic flight control system and system controls.", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "Empennage group mass. Contains mass of canards, horizontal/vertical stabilizers and fins, and ventral fins, and any supporting structure for mounted engines on those surfaces.", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "Empty mass of the aircraft. Includes structure group, propulsion group, and total systems and equipment mass.", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}
{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "empty mass margin", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": "INGASP.WFUL", "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "Operating Items group. Includes crew, unusable fuel, and oil mass.", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": "INGASP.OWE", "FLOPS": "MISSIN.DOWE"}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "Operating mass of the aircraft. Includes structure mass, crew (and crew baggage), unusable fuel, oil, and operational items like cargo containers and passenger service mass.", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "Propulsion group mass. Total mass of all engines on the aircraft, as well as energy system mass.", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "Total structure group mass. Includes the following groups: wing, epennage, fuselage, landing gear, air induction.", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "Systems and equipment group mass. Includes flight controls, auxilary power, instruments, hydraulics, pneumatics, electrical, avionics, furnishings and equipment, environmental control, and anti-icing mass.", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "Useful load of the aircraft is the difference between the max_gross_mass and the empty_mass.This includes operating_items, total_payload and total_fuel.", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "Aircraft zero fuel mass. Includes operating mass, passengers, baggage, and cargo.", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "sum of engine control, starter, and additional mass for all engines on aircraft", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "estimated mass of a single nacelle for each engine model", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": true}
{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "mass of paint for all wetted area", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}
{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "mass of passenger service equipment", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "total mass of thrust reversers for all engines on aircraft", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}
{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "galUS", "desc": "Total fuel volume", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}
{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "unusable fuel mass", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

metadata: {"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "mass of vertical tail", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}
{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "engine pod mass including nacelles", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": true}
{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "wing mass breakdown term 1", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

_children.metadata: {"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "unitless", "desc": "Wing bending material factor with sweep adjustment. Used to compute Aircraft.Wing.BENDING_MATERIAL_MASS", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "unitless", "desc": "Engine inertia relief factor for wingspan inboard of engine locations. Used to compute Aircraft.Wing.BENDING_MATERIAL_MASS", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

metadata: {"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "wing mass breakdown term 3", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}
{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "wing mass breakdown term 2", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "Wing group mass. Contains basic & secondary structures, ailerons/elevons, spoilers, flaps, and slats.", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

_children.metadata: {"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "unitless", "desc": "ratio of total sea-level-static thrust to aircraft takeoff gross weight", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": ["INGASP.WGS", "INGASP.WOS"], "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbf/ft**2", "desc": "ratio of aircraft gross takeoff weight to projected wing area", "option": false, "default_value": 0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

metadata: {"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbf", "desc": "total maximum thrust of all scaled engines on aircraft, sea-level static", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": "INGASP.THIN", "FLOPS": "CONFIN.THRUST"}, "units": "lbf", "desc": "Maximum sea-level static thrust of an engine after scaling. Optional for EngineDecks if Aircraft.Engine.SCALE_FACTOR is provided, in which case this variable is computed.", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": true}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": "INGASP.WFA", "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "total fuel carried at the beginnning of a mission includes fuel burned in the mission, reserve fuel and fuel margin", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "NM", "desc": "residual to make sure aircraft range is equal to the targeted range, value should be zero at convergence (within acceptable tolerance)", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "unitless", "desc": "regularized objective that maximizes range subject to other necessary additions", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": "None", "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "The final weight of the vehicle at the end of the last regular_phase (does not include reserve phases).", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "NM", "desc": "actual range that the aircraft flies on this mission. Equal to Aircraft.Design.RANGE value in the design case.", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": "None", "FLOPS": null}, "units": "min", "desc": "Total mission time from the start of the first regular_phaseto the end of the last regular_phase (does not include reserve phases).", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}

{"historical_name": {"GASP": null, "FLOPS": null}, "units": "lbm", "desc": "mass after aircraft has cleared 35 ft obstacle", "option": false, "default_value": 0.0, "types": "type", "multivalue": false}
